LSE-MS6-L4-10001300-MSSCI6-EXL-LAT-02 • MS Science Grade 6 • Temperature as Average Kinetic Energy of Particles

Still Moving

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why does the boy tell the girl not to write that the stream at El Yunque has no energy?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Develop a complete explanation: state what the boy notices about the cold stream, explain what he compares it to, and describe what his correction shows about whether cold things have energy.
